title: FunKite/solunatus
summary: Solar and lunar dashboard and library in Rust

title: Emanuele-Chiummo/llm-wiki-synapse
summary: Self-hosted AI wiki that organizes itself — LLM ingest, knowledge graph, cited chat, Obsidian-compatible vault. FastAPI + React + Tauri.

title: xopcai/xopc
summary: Local-first AI assistant for long-running goals, automations, workflows, and multi-surface chat.

title: strikersam/autonomous-ai-agency
summary: Autonomous AI Agent Infrastructure Platform — OpenAI-compatible AI gateway with MCP support, multi-agent orchestration, tool calling, observability, memory, RAG, AI workflows, and unified infrastructure for any LLM provider.

title: openyak/openyak
summary: Open-source local-first AI agent for desktop work. No account, no telemetry: use local models with Ollama/Rapid-MLX or bring your own provider key.

title: DefinitelyN0tMe/neuralforge
summary: Local AI workstation dashboard Neuralforge— manage LLMs, agents, RAG, Telegram AI bot with 14 meme personas & voice cloning, image/video/3D generation, and LoRA fine-tuning and SMM module from a single web UI. Runs entirely on your hardware.

title: ENTERPILOT/GoModel
summary: AI gateway written in Go. Lightweight unified OpenAI-compatible API for OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Groq, xAI & Ollama. LiteLLM alternative with observability, guardrails, streaming, costs and usage tracking.

title: Fortemi/fortemi
summary: Self-hosted AI knowledge base with hybrid semantic search (pgvector + FTS + RRF), MCP server, multi-provider LLM inference (Ollama, OpenAI, OpenRouter, llama.cpp), multimodal ingestion (vision, audio transcription, speaker diarization), and knowledge graph. Rust + PostgreSQL.

title: bedeberger/schreibwerkstatt
summary: KI-gestütztes Lektorat-Tool für BookStack

title: brandonkindred/Khala-Agentic-AI-Teams
summary: Many Agents, one objective... yours

title: DeltaCorvi/AT-Workshop-Keeping-Things-Local-2026
summary: Lab manual and references for a four-hour, hands-on workshop that shows you how to build a working, private AI service running entirely on hardware you control, accessible securely across your team or engagement, with authentication built in.

title: wlsdks/muse-agent
summary: An AI you live with, not one you visit. A little bluebird settles into your computer — keeps your unfinished threads, learns your rhythms, and gets better at helping the longer you're together. Local-first: your life stays on your machine.

title: Gitlawb/zero
summary: The coding agent that answers to you, your model, your machine, your rules.

title: Bike4Mind/bike4mind
summary: The open-core AI workbench — notebooks, agents, RAG, voice, and images across any model: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI, or local via Ollama/vLLM. BSL 1.1,  auto-converting to Apache-2.0 on a two-year clock. Your AI keeps running when theirs doesn't.

title: browseros-ai/BrowserOS
summary: 🌐 The open-source Agentic browser; alternative to ChatGPT Atlas, Perplexity Comet, Dia.

title: briandenicola/Aurearia
summary: Self-hosted app for cataloging, organizing, and sharing your coin collection

title: OpenAgentHQ/modeldock
summary: The lightweight, Python-first model manager for local LLMs - the package manager for local AI models. Discover, download, cache, verify, and load models through pluggable runtime adapters (Ollama, LM Studio, llama.cpp, and more). 100+ good-first-issues welcome!

title: jaymeklein/embedbase
summary: Local-first document embedding and retrieval platform with a REST API and MCP server for LLM agents. Supports hybrid BM25 + semantic search across workspaces and collections, with pluggable parsers, embedders, and vector stores.

title: Tlahey/git-manager
summary: 🐙 A beautiful, free macOS Git client — visual commit graph, AI commit messages via local Ollama, safe rollback & undo. 100% local, zero telemetry. Tauri + React + Rust.

title: RunAnyDev/runany
summary: Open-source Astro MDX tech blog for AI setup guides, local LLMs, Ollama, developer tools, self-hosted tutorials, and automation workflows
